message:
feat(mesh,telemetry,openai): add trace capture integration to mesh nodes and expand OpenAI connector

Mesh node trace capture (fcp-mesh):
- Integrate TraceCapture into MeshNode for structured event logging of
  gossip events, lease transitions, routing decisions, admission outcomes,
  and session lifecycle
- Add MeshNodeConfig::with_trace_capture_config() and
  with_trace_capture_zones() for configuring capture behavior
- Emit TraceEvents at key orchestration points (symbol requests, lease
  acquisitions, route selections, admission gates)
- Add zone-based filtering for selective trace capture (~400 lines)

Trace capture (fcp-telemetry):
- Expand trace_capture.rs with additional event types: GossipEvent,
  LeaseEvent, RoutingDecision, AdmissionOutcome, SessionEvent
- Add CapturedTrace aggregate type for serialization

OpenAI connector:
- Expand connector.rs with retry logic, rate limit handling, and streaming
  response accumulation (~300 lines)
- Add main.rs entrypoint export

Mesh integration tests:
- Expand test scenarios with trace capture verification

Also update Cargo.lock and beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,7 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut OpenAIConnector, message: &str) -> serde
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
         "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
